title: Russia
short: Vehicle export and parts for the Russian market.
description:
We specialize in exporting used vehicles and auto parts to Russia using various efficient methods according to customer needs and regulatory requirements. Our primary export method is Complete Vehicle Export via Roll-on/Roll-off (RoRo), which involves shipping fully assembled vehicles on specialized RoRo vessels that can carry cars, trucks, and other wheeled vehicles. This method is cost-effective for complete vehicles and ensures they arrive in pristine condition without disassembly.

For parts export, we offer Light-Duty Cutting, where vehicles are partially dismantled into manageable sections for easier container loading and reduced shipping costs. Frame Cutting involves precise cutting of vehicle frames to optimize space in containers while maintaining structural integrity. We also provide Disassembled Car Spare Parts on Pallets, where vehicles are completely dismantled, parts are carefully sorted, packaged, and loaded onto pallets for bulk shipping.

For European brands, we handle Disassembled Complete Cars Loading in Containers, where vehicles are dismantled into major components (engine, chassis, body panels, etc.), numbered for easy reassembly, and loaded into standard shipping containers. This CKD (Completely Knocked Down) method is particularly suitable for European vehicles destined for Russia, allowing for customs optimization and cost savings.

All shipments include full export documentation, customs clearance assistance, and insurance coverage. We work closely with Russian importers to ensure compliance with local regulations and smooth customs processing.

bullets.desc: Complete vehicle export via Roll-on/Roll (RoRo) - As we are located in Toyama, so for RoRo export we mostly use SHINKO port Toyama and IWASE port Toyama
Light-duty cutting - This method mostly uses for saving some customs duties according to customer’s demand
Frame cut & Half Cut - Frame-cut or Half-cut method is widely use for export in all over the world
Disassembled one car's all spare parts on a pallet - In this method we completely disassembled one car into parts and then rapped & packed on a Pallet

bullets.desc: Disassembled complete cars loading in Container (Japanese & European brands) - Export by Container of disassembled (12~15) cars into parts and then (rapped & packed) in Boxes

title: UAE (Dubai & Sharjah)
short: Used auto-parts in bulk by container to UAE.
description: We export bulk used auto-parts in containers to Dubai and Sharjah with optimized container loading and secure packaging. Services include tire container shipments and specialized container packing for auto parts.

bullets.desc: Used Auto-Parts in Bulk by Container - Mostly parts of big trucks, Engines, half-cuts, fork lifts, cranes and all kind of other parts in Containerized shipment

title: Pakistan
short: Bulk used auto-parts and complete vehicle export.
description: Bulk used auto-parts by container and complete vehicle export via RoRo or containerized shipment to Pakistan. We prepare and document shipments per customer requirements.

bullets.desc: Complete vehicle export via RoRo or containerized shipment - According to the shipping schedules and space availability we use RoRo export method from almost all major ports of Japan and for 3 ~6 cars together, Containerized shipment is also a cost affective method
Bulk Used Auto-Parts by Container - Bulk Used Auto-Parts by Container method is used for highly in demand parts in Pakistan
img: images/services/russia/Disassembled complete cars loading in Container-7.jpeg

title: Philippines
short: Vehicles and parts for the Philippine market.
description: Common vehicles: Japanese trucks, kei-trucks and vans. Vehicles are dismantled via CKD and Rack & Stack; parts numbered for reassembly on arrival.

bullets.desc: Rack & Stack - Making a set of 2~3 big and small trucks or dumps to fit inside a container

CKD (complete knock down) - CKD (Complete knock down) is the most commonly use method for small (KEI) trucks and vans i.e. Suzuki Carry, Every (Multi Cab). As each vehicle are dismantled, then parts are carefully numbered specific to the given vehicle ready for reassemble on arrival.

description: Complete vehicle export via RoRo or containerized shipment. CKD and Rack & Stack (dismantled and reassembled on arrival) and bulk used auto-parts by container.
